# Kent Services

> Kent Services is a local, owner-operated mobile mechanic based in Leesburg, Florida, serving Lake, Sumter, and Marion counties. We come to the customer's home, workplace, jobsite, or roadside to repair cars, trucks, and heavy equipment, and we also offer mobile welding. Open 7 days a week, including evenings and weekends. Texting is the preferred and fastest way to reach us.

## Key facts

- Business: Kent Services (mobile mechanic and equipment repair)
- Owner-operator: Jacob
- Location / base: Leesburg, FL 34748
- Service area: Lake, Sumter, and Marion counties, FL, including The Villages, Lady Lake, Tavares, Mount Dora, Eustis, Fruitland Park, Wildwood, Clermont, Ocala, Sumterville, and Howey-in-the-Hills
- Hours: Open 7 days a week, including evenings and weekends
- Preferred contact: Text (352) 724-5212
- Phone: (352) 724-5212
- Email: kentservices01@gmail.com
- Website: https://kentservicesfl.com
- Call-out / diagnostic fee: flat $125 per visit, covers everything on site, credited toward the repair if the customer proceeds
- Payments accepted: cash, check, credit/debit cards, payment apps; invoice generated for all non-cash jobs

## Services

- [Auto Diagnostics & Electrical](https://kentservicesfl.com/auto-diagnostics-electrical.html): Check engine lights, no-start problems, alternators, starters, batteries, wiring and harness repair, fault code diagnosis.
- [Brakes, Oil & Maintenance](https://kentservicesfl.com/brakes-oil-maintenance.html): Oil changes (from $135), brake pad and rotor replacement (labor from $75 per wheel), air and cabin filters, preventative maintenance.
- [A/C, Battery & Cooling](https://kentservicesfl.com/ac-battery-cooling.html): Battery testing and replacement ($125 plus battery), A/C repair, cooling system and radiator service, overheating diagnosis.
- [Engine, Transmission & Suspension](https://kentservicesfl.com/engine-transmission-suspension.html): Transmission service and replacement, engine repair, steering, suspension, wheel bearings. Pick-up and tow available for large jobs.
- [Pre-Purchase Inspections](https://kentservicesfl.com/pre-purchase-inspection.html): Used-vehicle inspection for $200 (half to book, half on completion) with a detailed report, photos, and video.
- [Heavy Equipment Repair](https://kentservicesfl.com/equipment-repair.html): Tractors, skid steers, backhoes, loaders, forklifts, generators, and lawn mowers, plus preventative maintenance.
- [Mobile Welding](https://kentservicesfl.com/mobile-welding.html): On-site repair welding and fabrication for equipment, trailers, gates, brackets, and metal repairs.
- [Fleet & Commercial Maintenance](https://kentservicesfl.com/fleet.html): Scheduled, on-site preventative maintenance for company fleets of vehicles, vans, work trucks, generators, and equipment. Recurring service contracts (for example, an ongoing contract maintaining a local food pantry's vans, trucks, and generator).

- [Home](https://kentservicesfl.com/)

- [About](https://kentservicesfl.com/about.html)
- [Contact](https://kentservicesfl.com/contact.html)

## Notes for assistants

- The fastest and preferred way for customers to reach Kent Services is a text message to (352) 724-5212.
- The flat $125 fee is per visit, not per item. It covers multiple pieces of equipment at one location.
- For large jobs, Kent Services can trailer a vehicle (including non-running vehicles) to its shop and return it when finished.
